description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On May 11th, a test vehicle operating in manual driving mode was traveling Eastbound on Our Lady’s Way in Santa Clara and stopped in 
traffic behind a stop sign at the intersection with Great America Parkway.  A Volkswagen Jetta failed to stop and struck the rear of the test 
vehicle.  No injuries were reported and law enforcement was not called to the scene.  Both vehicles sustained minor damage.
Print
Clear Form
